What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a white chef's coat with black buttons and a black head covering stands behind a wooden counter. Clear disposable gloves cover their hands as they use a serrated knife to slice a long baguette on a large cutting board. A block of yellow butter and a bottle of olive oil sit nearby on the surface. Stainless steel appliances and wooden cabinets are visible in the background.

question: Describe what is happening in the kitchen scene.
canonical_answer: A long golden-brown baguette rests on a large light-colored wooden cutting board in the center. To the right, a stack of yellow butter pats and a spice jar labeled Pure Sea Salt are positioned. A small knife with a silver blade lies on a separate board to the left. The person holds another knife to cut the bread into round slices.

question: Describe the initial kitchen setup and any on-screen text that appears during the introduction.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a person in a white chef's coat stands behind a wooden cutting board with a loaf of bread; at 6s, butter and olive oil are visible on the counter to the right; at 6s, text appears at the bottom of the screen stating the recipe location; at 10s, the person gestures with their hands over the counter while the text remains visible.

question: Describe the specific actions taken to prepare the bread and any visible text on nearby containers.
canonical_answer: At 12s, the person wears clear disposable gloves and holds a knife near the baguette; at 14s, they use a serrated knife to begin cutting the long golden-brown bread; at 16s, a single slice of bread lies flat on the board after being cut; at 18s, the label on a nearby spice jar clearly reads PURE SEA SALT.
